option_labels: Assign — name a demo inbox owner with a 24hr SLA
Defer — continue without a named inbox owner
context: From ra_agent_roundtable_daily_adversarial_2026_03_21: A test inquiry went 3 days unanswered. The website has CTAs leading to contact forms but no named owner is responsible for responding within a defined SLA. This blocks the waitlist CTA deployment (existing HITL item) and degrades conversion from any live lead capture. Need a named human owner with a committed response window.
